text:
Formatted as MMDDYY10 in SAS 

In OCM, episodes were initiated on the date of service for an initial Part B chemotherapy drug claim 
with a corresponding cancer diagnosis on the claim, or on the fill date for an initial Part D 
chemotherapy drug claim with a corresponding Part B claim for cancer on the date of, or in the 59 
days preceding, the drug claim (variable called EPSD_BGN_DT). Episodes continued for six months 
after the triggering chemotherapy event, as long as the beneficiary met
